---
title: "Experience"
---

<div class="timeline">

<div class="timeline-item">
<h3>Biostatistician</h3>
<div class="timeline-date">Oct 2025 — Present</div>
<div class="timeline-location">Grady Memorial Hospital / Emory University School of Medicine</div>
<ul>
<li>Large-scale claims data analysis (>2.1M patients)</li>
<li>Survival analysis (Cox regression, Kaplan-Meier)</li>
<li>Systematic review & meta-analysis</li>
<li>RCT efficacy analysis</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
<h3>Research Assistant</h3>
<div class="timeline-date">Sep 2025 — Present</div>
<div class="timeline-location">Emory University Rollins School of Public Health</div>
<ul>
<li>Transcriptomic deconvolution (CIBERSORTx)</li>
<li>Unsupervised clustering for MDD immune subtypes</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
<h3>Data Analyst</h3>
<div class="timeline-date">Sep 2024 — May 2025</div>
<div class="timeline-location">Emory CIDMATH</div>
<ul>
<li>ETL pipelines & Databricks platform</li>
<li>Disease transmission simulation tool evaluation</li>
</ul>
</div>

</div>
